query:
SELECT 
  q.versionNumber,
  qi.itemNumber,
  qi.itemType,
  qi.description,
  qi.totalPrice
FROM quotations q
JOIN quotationItems qi ON q.id = qi.quotationId
WHERE q.quotationNumber = 'COT-2026-1775675643251'
ORDER BY q.versionNumber DESC, qi.itemNumber ASC;
command:

  q.versionNumber,
  qi.itemNumber,
  qi.itemType,
  qi.description,
  qi.totalPrice
FROM quotations q
JOIN quotationItems qi ON q.id = qi.quotationId
WHERE q.quotationNumber = 'COT-2026-1775675643251'
ORDER BY q.versionNumber DESC, qi.itemNumber ASC;
